text.title: Spec-Kit Three-Step Pipeline (specify → plan → tasks) Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the methodology produces a spec artefact from the input through every rule + procedure step.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Worked example in `content/05-examples.xml`: feature `user-export` traced from request → spec.md → plan.md → tasks.md with one [P] task.
